name: Morton's Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the first 7 ingredients in a processor or blender until smooth.
2. Add the Parmesan cheese and blend just until combined.
3. Season to taste with salt.
4. The dressing can be prepared up to 2 days ahead. Bring to room temperature before serving.
5. Add croutons just before tossing the salad.
